name: severity resolver: severity 0/"off" prevents the rule from running
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --severity off --in "$PWD/file.js" --report-format json 2>out.json && [ "$(node -e 'process.stdout.write(String(JSON.parse(require(\"fs\").readFileSync(\"out.json\",\"utf8\")).messages.length))')" = "0" ] && echo ok 1>&2
